message:
feat(web): improve database loading and WASM initialization

DatabaseLoader (DatabaseLoader.ts):
- Add stale cache detection and background refresh capability
- When manifest hash differs from cached hash, mark cache as "stale"
  but still load it (fast path) while indicating update is available
- Return stale flag and manifestHash from checkCache()
- Update progress messages to indicate when update is available:
  "Loading cached database (update available)..."
  "Database ready (cached, update available)"
- Enables faster app startup while keeping data fresh

wasm-loader.ts:
- Add WASM SIMD variant detection and preferential loading
- Define WasmComputeVariant type: 'baseline' | 'simd'
- Include variant in WasmLoadResult and WasmLoadState
- Check canUseWasmSimd() to determine which variant to load
- Try SIMD variant first for ~2-3x performance on supported browsers
- Graceful fallback to baseline if SIMD unavailable or fails
- Add logging for variant selection and timing

useDatabaseQuery.ts:
- Minor cleanup and consistency improvements

inline-wasm-compute.ts (scripts):
- Add --pkg-dir CLI argument for flexible package directory
- Add wasm-bindgen glue code patching for known getter bugs:
  - SequenceHandle.length incorrectly called bonddetectionresult_bond_count
  - DenseKmerResult.k incorrectly called cgrcountsresult_resolution
  - DotPlotBuffers.bins incorrectly called cgrcountsresult_resolution
  - KLScanResult.window_count/k incorrect getters
  - MinHashSignature.total_kmers/k incorrect getters
- These patches fix runtime errors when accessing WASM struct properties
- Add .gitignore file generation in pkg directory
- Improve error handling and logging

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
